title: PropertyDefinition
content:
# PropertyDefinition


## Properties

- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the Property Definition.
- **title** (`string`): Unique identifier `title` of the Property Definition.
- **primitive_type** (`string`): 
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Property was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Property keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
summary: Object with properties: name, title, primitive_type, created, updated

name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the Property Definition.

title.description: Unique identifier `title` of the Property Definition.

created.description: UTC time when the Property was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated.description: UTC time when any Property keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
